006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.lang.reflect.*;
024import java.time.*;
025import java.time.temporal.*;
026import java.util.*;
027import java.util.function.*;
028
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
033
034/**
035 * Session for serializing objects to TOML format.
036 */
037@SuppressWarnings({
038   "resource",   // TomlWriter lifecycle managed by SerializerPipe
039   "rawtypes",   // Raw types necessary for generic type handling
040   "java:S110",  // Inheritance depth acceptable for serializer session hierarchy
041   "java:S115",  // Constants use naming conventions that embed type info or config keys (e.g. PROP_trimWhitespace)
042   "java:S3776", // Cognitive complexity acceptable for serialization logic
043   "java:S6541"  // Acceptable for session implementation
044})
045public class TomlSerializerSession extends WriterSerializerSession implements RecordWritable {
046
047   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
048
049   /**
050    * Builder for TOML serializer session.
051    */
052   public static class Builder extends WriterSerializerSession.Builder<Builder> {
053
054      private TomlSerializer ctx;
055
056      protected Builder(TomlSerializer ctx) {
057         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
058         this.ctx = ctx;
059      }
060
061      @Override
062      public TomlSerializerSession build() {
063         return new TomlSerializerSession(this);
064      }
065   }
066
067   /**
068    * Creates a session builder.
069    *
070    * @param ctx The serializer context.
071    * @return The builder.
072    */
073   public static Builder create(TomlSerializer ctx) {
074      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
075   }
076
077   private final TomlSerializer ctx;
078
079   protected TomlSerializerSession(Builder builder) {
080      super(builder);
081      ctx = builder.ctx;
082   }
083
084   @Override /* RecordWritable */
085   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
086      return RecordAdapter.writer(this, output);
087   }
088
089   @Override /* RecordWritable */
090   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
091      return false;
092   }
093
094   @Override
095   protected void doSerialize(SerializerPipe out, Object o) throws IOException, SerializeException {
096      if (o == null)
097         return;
098      TomlWriter w = getTomlWriter(out);
099      serializeRoot(w, o);
100   }
101
102   protected final TomlWriter getTomlWriter(SerializerPipe out) {
103      var output = out.getRawOutput();
104      if (output instanceof TomlWriter w)
105         return w;
106      var w = new TomlWriter(out.getWriter(), isUseWhitespace(), getMaxIndent(), isTrimStrings(), getUriResolver());
107      out.setWriter(w);
108      return w;
109   }
110
111   private void serializeRoot(TomlWriter w, Object o) throws SerializeException {
112      ClassMeta<?> eType = getExpectedRootType(o);
113      if (eType.isBean()) {
114         serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(o), "");
115      } else if (eType.isMap()) {
116         serializeMapAtRoot(w, (Map<?,?>)o, eType);
117      } else if (eType.isCollection() || eType.isArray()) {
118         Collection<?> c = eType.isArray() ? toList(eType.inner(), o) : (Collection<?>)o;
119         ClassMeta<?> elType = eType.getElementType();
120         if (elType.isBean() || elType.isMap()) {
121            // Array of tables at root - use "item" as table name
122            for (Object item : c) {
123               w.blankLine();
124               w.arrayOfTablesHeader("item");
125               if (elType.isBean())
126                  serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(item), "item");
127               else
128                  serializeMapAsTable(w, "item", (Map)item, elType);
129            }
130         } else {
131            // Root array of simples: wrap in _value
132            w.bareKey("_value");
133            w.w(" = ");
134            serializeArray(w, c, eType);
135            w.w('\n');
136         }
137      } else {
138         // Root primitive: wrap in _value
139         w.bareKey("_value");
140         w.w(" = ");
141         serializeValue(w, o, eType);
142         w.w('\n');
143      }
144   }
145
146   private void serializeMapAtRoot(TomlWriter w, Map<?,?> map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
147      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
148      forEachEntry(map, e -> {
149         String k = e.getKey() == null ? "null" : toString(e.getKey());
150         Object v = e.getValue();
151         if (!checkNull.test(v))
152            return;
153         ClassMeta<?> aType = getClassMetaForObject(v, type);
154         if (aType.isMap() && v instanceof Map<?,?> nested) {
155            w.blankLine();
156            w.tableHeader(k);
157            serializeMapAsTable(w, k, nested, aType);
158         } else {
159            writeKeyValue(w, k, v, null);
160         }
161      });
162   }
163
164   private void serializeBean(TomlWriter w, BeanMap<?> m, String tablePath) throws SerializeException {
165      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
166      List<Map.Entry<BeanPropertyMeta, Object>> simple = new ArrayList<>();
167      List<Map.Entry<BeanPropertyMeta, Object>> complex = new ArrayList<>();
168
169      m.forEachValue(checkNull, (pMeta, key, value, thrown) -> {
170         if (nn(thrown))
171            onBeanGetterException(pMeta, thrown);
172         ClassMeta<?> cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
173         if (canIgnoreValue(pMeta, key, value))
174            return;
175         ClassMeta<?> aType = value == null ? cMeta : getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
176         if (isSimpleOrInlineTable(aType, value, pMeta)) {
177            simple.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(pMeta, value));
178         } else {
179            complex.add(new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(pMeta, value));
180         }
181      });
182
183      if (ctx.sortKeys) {
184         simple.sort(Comparator.comparing(e -> e.getKey().getName()));
185         complex.sort(Comparator.comparing(e -> e.getKey().getName()));
186      }
187
188      // Pass 1: simple values and inline tables
189      for (var e : simple) {
190         String key = e.getKey().getName();
191         Object value = e.getValue();
192         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = e.getKey();
193         writeKeyValue(w, key, value, pMeta);
194      }
195
196      // Pass 2: tables and array of tables
197      for (var e : complex) {
198         String key = e.getKey().getName();
199         Object value = e.getValue();
200         BeanPropertyMeta pMeta = e.getKey();
201         ClassMeta<?> cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
202         String newPath = tablePath.isEmpty() ? key : tablePath + "." + key;
203
204         if (nn(value)) {
205            w.blankLine();
206            ClassMeta<?> aType = getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
207            if (aType.isBean()) {
208               w.tableHeader(newPath);
209               serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(value), newPath);
210            } else if (aType.isMap()) {
211               w.tableHeader(newPath);
212               serializeMapAsTable(w, newPath, (Map)value, cMeta);
213            } else if (aType.isCollection() || aType.isArray()) {
214               Collection<?> col = aType.isArray() ? toList(aType.inner(), value) : (Collection<?>)value;
215               ClassMeta<?> elType = aType.getElementType();
216               if (elType.isBean() || elType.isMap()) {
217                  for (Object item : col) {
218                     w.blankLine();
219                     w.arrayOfTablesHeader(newPath);
220                     if (elType.isBean())
221                        serializeBean(w, toBeanMap(item), newPath);
222                     else
223                        serializeMapAsTable(w, newPath, (Map)item, elType);
224                  }
225               } else {
226                  writeKeyValue(w, key, value, pMeta);
227               }
228            }
229         }
230      }
231   }
232
233   private void writeKeyValue(TomlWriter w, String key, Object value, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
234      ClassMeta<?> cMeta;
235      if (pMeta != null)
236         cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
237      else if (value != null)
238         cMeta = getClassMetaForObject(value);
239      else
240         cMeta = object();
241      ClassMeta<?> aType = value == null ? cMeta : getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta);
242
243      // Apply swap
244      var swap = aType.getSwap(this);
245      if (nn(swap)) {
246         value = swap(swap, value);
247         aType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
248         if (aType.isObject())
249            aType = getClassMetaForObject(value);
250      }
251
252      if (value == null && !isKeepNullProperties())
253         return;
254
255      writeKey(w, key);
256      w.w(" = ");
257      if (value == null)
258         w.stringValue(ctx.getNullValue());
259      else
260         writeValue(w, value, aType, pMeta);
261      w.w('\n');
262   }
263
264   private static void writeKey(TomlWriter w, String key) {
265      if (w.isBareKey(key))
266         w.bareKey(key);
267      else
268         w.quotedKey(key);
269   }
270
271   @SuppressWarnings({
272      "unused",       // pMeta accepted for API consistency; may be used by future format-specific logic
273      "java:S1172"    // Same as above
274   })
275   private void writeValue(TomlWriter w, Object value, ClassMeta<?> aType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
276      if (value == null) {
277         w.stringValue(ctx.getNullValue());
278         return;
279      }
280      // Resolve to the runtime type and apply any registered swap.  Required for collection/array
281      // elements that arrive here without having gone through writeKeyValue's swap step (e.g.
282      // List<Locale> elements where the bean-property swap is on the List, not on Locale).
283      // Bug #8: without this, Locale list-elements wire as Locale.toString() ("en_US") regardless of
284      // the configured LocaleFormat, breaking BCP_47 round-trips on the parser side.
285      var rType = getClassMetaForObject(value, aType);
286      var swap = rType.getSwap(this);
287      if (nn(swap)) {
288         value = swap(swap, value);
289         rType = swap.getSwapClassMeta(this);
290         if (rType.isObject())
291            rType = getClassMetaForObject(value);
292         aType = rType;
293      }
294      if (value == null) {
295         w.stringValue(ctx.getNullValue());
296         return;
297      }
298      if (aType.isBean()) {
299         BeanMap<?> bm = toBeanMap(value);
300         if (shouldUseInlineTable(bm)) {
301            w.inlineTableStart();
302            boolean[] first = {true};
303            Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
304            bm.forEachValue(checkNull, (pm, k, v, th) -> {
305               if (!first[0]) w.w(", ");
306               first[0] = false;
307               writeKey(w, k);
308               w.w(" = ");
309            writeValue(w, v, (ClassMeta<?>) pm.getBeanInfo(), pm);
310            });
311            w.inlineTableEnd();
312         } else {
313            serializeBean(w, bm, "");
314         }
315      } else if (aType.isNumber()) {
316         if (value instanceof Float || value instanceof Double)
317            w.floatValue(((Number)value).doubleValue());
318         else
319            w.integerValue(((Number)value).longValue());
320      } else if (aType.isBoolean()) {
321         w.booleanValue((Boolean)value);
322      } else if (aType.isEnum()) {
323         w.stringValue(((Enum<?>)value).name());
324      } else if (aType.isDate()) {
325         w.w(serializeDate((Date)value, aType));
326      } else if (aType.isCalendar()) {
327         w.w(serializeCalendar(value, aType));
328      } else if (aType.isTemporal()) {
329         Class<?> inner = aType.inner();
330         if (inner == Year.class || inner == YearMonth.class)
331            w.stringValue(serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)value, aType));
332         else
333            w.w(serializeTemporal((TemporalAccessor)value, aType));
334      } else if (aType.isDuration()) {
335         w.stringValue(serializeDuration((Duration)value));
336      } else if (aType.isPeriod()) {
337         w.stringValue(serializePeriod((Period)value));
338      } else if (value.getClass().isArray()) {
339         // Bug #11/#12 a04 residual (generalized): when aType arrives erased — most commonly
340         // because the value is a typed List<T[]> bean-property element and the parent List's
341         // elementType resolved to Object (getClassMetaForObject(value, cMeta) ignores the
342         // cMeta hint when value != null and returns the raw runtime ArrayList ClassMeta) —
343         // the isCollection/isArray dispatch below doesn't fire and the value would otherwise
344         // stringify via Object.toString() ("[B@<hash>", "[I@<hash>", …).  Detect the array
345         // shape from the runtime class and emit a TOML inline-array, recursing on each
346         // (boxed) element through writeValue so the per-element wire form (integer / float
347         // / bool / string) follows the standard dispatch.  Subsumes the byte[]-only fix that
348         // originally landed for the BinaryFormat.NOT_SET round-trip and extends it to
349         // int[]/long[]/short[]/float[]/double[]/boolean[]/char[]/String[]/Object[] (and any
350         // nested array shape via the recursive writeValue step).  At configured (non-NOT_SET)
351         // binary formats the per-property BinarySwap has already fired in writeKeyValue's
352         // swap step, so byte[] values reach this branch only at NOT_SET — a no-op for the
353         // configured-format paths.  java.lang.reflect.Array.get auto-boxes primitive
354         // elements, so a single runtime-typed loop covers every primitive component type.
355         int len = Array.getLength(value);
356         w.arrayStart();
357         for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) {
358            if (i > 0) w.w(", ");
359            Object el = Array.get(value, i);
360            if (el == null)
361               w.stringValue(ctx.getNullValue());
362            else
363               writeValue(w, el, getClassMetaForObject(el), null);
364         }
365         w.arrayEnd();
366      } else if (aType.isCollection() || aType.isArray()) {
367         Collection<?> c = aType.isArray() ? toList(aType.inner(), value) : (Collection<?>)value;
368         ClassMeta<?> elType = aType.getElementType();
369         if (elType.isBean() || elType.isMap()) {
370            // Should have been handled in complex pass
371            w.stringValue(value.toString());
372         } else {
373            w.arrayStart();
374            boolean first = true;
375            for (Object el : c) {
376               if (!first) w.w(", ");
377               first = false;
378               if (el == null)
379                  w.stringValue(ctx.getNullValue());
380               else
381                  writeValue(w, el, elType, null);
382            }
383            w.arrayEnd();
384         }
385      } else {
386         w.stringValue(toString(value));
387      }
388   }
389
390   private void serializeValue(TomlWriter w, Object value, ClassMeta<?> aType) throws SerializeException {
391      writeValue(w, value, aType, null);
392   }
393
394   @SuppressWarnings({
395      "unused",       // path and type reserved for future section-header and type-aware serialization
396      "java:S1172"    // Same as above
397   })
398   private void serializeMapAsTable(TomlWriter w, String path, Map<?,?> map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
399      Predicate<Object> checkNull = x -> isKeepNullProperties() || nn(x);
400      forEachEntry(map, e -> {
401         String k = e.getKey() == null ? "null" : toString(e.getKey());
402         Object v = e.getValue();
403         if (!checkNull.test(v))
404            return;
405         writeKeyValue(w, k, v, null);
406      });
407   }
408
409   private void serializeArray(TomlWriter w, Collection<?> c, ClassMeta<?> type) throws SerializeException {
410      ClassMeta<?> elType = type.getElementType();
411      w.arrayStart();
412      boolean first = true;
413      for (Object el : c) {
414         if (!first) w.w(", ");
415         first = false;
416         serializeValue(w, el, elType);
417      }
418      w.arrayEnd();
419   }
420
421   @SuppressWarnings({
422      "unused",       // pMeta accepted for API consistency with callers that track property context
423      "java:S1172"    // Same as above
424   })
425   private boolean isSimpleOrInlineTable(ClassMeta<?> aType, Object value, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta) throws SerializeException {
426      if (aType.isBean()) {
427         BeanMap<?> bm = toBeanMap(value);
428         return shouldUseInlineTable(bm);
429      }
430      return !aType.isMap() && !(aType.isCollectionOrArray() && aType.getElementType().isBean());
431   }
432
433   private boolean shouldUseInlineTable(BeanMap<?> bm) {
434      if (!ctx.useInlineTables)
435         return false;
436      int count = 0;
437      for (BeanPropertyMeta p : bm.getMeta().getProperties().values()) {
438         if (!p.isReadOnly()) {
439            ClassMeta<?> cm = (ClassMeta<?>) p.getBeanInfo();
440            if (cm.isBean() || cm.isMap() || (cm.isCollectionOrArray() && cm.getElementType().isBean()))
441               return false;
442            count++;
443            if (count > ctx.inlineTableThreshold)
444               return false;
445         }
446      }
447      return count <= ctx.inlineTableThreshold;
448   }
449}
